blocks.content: The mountain animals were torn apart, their remains hanging from branches like laundry.
Among them were even fierce predators.
The arriving children covered their mouths. Not screaming was commendable enough for hunters.

blocks.speaker: Martin
blocks.content: A-Altol. What happened? Did the Cowbear really do this?
Martin's voice trembled, and Lumina turned away, eyes tightly shut.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go. This isn't something we can handle.

blocks.speaker: Martin
blocks.content: No, we need to see more. We have to know what's going on.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Altol! This is serious!

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: That's why we're going! If this thing stays in the mountains, the game will flee! We'll starve!

blocks.speaker: Martin
blocks.content: I get that, but it's too dangerous. Let's report it to the city.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Report? Have you gone soft hanging out with nobles? Who'd care about hunters?

blocks.speaker: Martin
blocks.content: Idiot, that's what I'm saying! This isn't some minor incident. Look at those animals. Don't you see how dangerous this is?
Martin interjected. "S-Shirone. Altol. Look over there."
The bushes rustled.
Shirone and Altol nocked arrows simultaneously, aiming at the sound.
Rustle. Rustle.
The shaking leaves heightened the tension. The children readied their weapons, waiting for the mystery creature to appear.
When it did, their arrows instinctively aimed higher.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: T-this can't be…
Grrrr.
A wolf-like monster over two meters tall hunched before them, muscles bulging like boulders.
Its waist was slender, arms reaching its knees, and its hooked claws were as long as a human pinky.
Reverse-jointed legs supported its body like a cat's, making it agile.

blocks.speaker: Martin
blocks.content: A… monster.
Evolutionists believed all animals, including humans, descended from a single origin. But monsters came from an entirely different lineage. They were stronger, faster, and even intelligent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wolf-like, bipedal… an Ulk.'
Shirone recalled his studies. Ulks lacked language but could express hundreds of emotions through sounds. They lived in tribes, exhibiting social behavior.
With their claws, speed, and strength, they were balanced monsters even hunters avoided when in groups.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But why here? This region has no monsters.'

Only one explanation came to mind: the Ulks had lost a tribal war and migrated here. The wounds covering the creature's body supported this. Its fur was matted with blood—impossible to tell how much was its own.
The children's ragged breaths reminded Altol of his duty as leader. He had to act.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: It's still a living thing. A headshot will kill it.
Altol took a deep breath and fired.
The Ulk, aware of the threat, simply tilted its head, dodging effortlessly. Then it laughed, scratching its throat.
Grrr. Grrrr.
The children gasped. But the real horror was yet to come.
Crack!
The Ulk shattered a tree trunk with its jaws. Then it roared at Altol.
Grrraaah!

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Damn it! Run!
Seeing the display of raw power, Altol abandoned all thought of firing again.
They fled toward the summit, Shirone lingering to fire one last arrow.
Grrraaah!
The provocation enraged the Ulk, but it bought the others time.
The creature lunged, claws aimed at Shirone's skull.
Grrraaah!
Shirone's body flashed, teleporting him into the air.
Grr?
The Ulk stared as Shirone hovered above.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not here. The summit.
Altol urged the struggling children onward. Choosing not to descend was wise—they'd have tumbled downhill.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Faster! Run!
They abandoned their gear, sprinting uphill.

blocks.speaker: Lumina
blocks.content: Shirone? Where is he?

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: He's buying time! Just move!
Altol worried for Shirone, but panic wouldn't help. His priority was the others.
Grrraaah!
As they reached the summit, the Ulk's roar echoed from below.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: If the monster was here, Shirone had either escaped or died.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Damn it! Nowhere to hide!
The summit was a flat clearing ending in a cliff. Twenty meters wasn't insurmountable, but they had no time to climb down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Altol! It's coming!
The Ulk scaled the slope, claws scraping the ground.
Sunlight glinted off its muscular frame.
Altol stepped forward as bait.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Over here!
But with the cliff at their backs, escape was impossible.
Altol turned, fists raised.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Even his trained muscles were child's play against a monster.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Screw this! I don't care anymore!
As he swung, the Ulk vanished.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Run!
Altol whirled around.
Shirone was suddenly there, grappling with the Ulk.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: H-how?
He tried to help, but Shirone teleported again, leaving him stunned.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Whoa. That's magic, right?
The children gaped as Shirone blinked around the Ulk, dodging every attack.
Grrraaah!
Frustrated, the Ulk turned toward the group.
Aaaah!
The terrified children scattered—except Lumina, frozen in place.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Lumina! Run!

blocks.speaker: Lumina
blocks.content: A…ah…
Shirone reached out, combining photon output with omnipresence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Lumina was outside the Spirit Zone's range.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! Too far!
He reshaped the zone into a cross, finally sensing the Ulk.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Photon Output!
A flash struck the Ulk's eyes. It howled, shielding its face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He did it! Shirone beat it!
The dazzling light made them think the monster was dead.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone knew photons had no physical force.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lumina! Run! Now!

blocks.speaker: Lumina
blocks.content: What? It just shoots light?
Grrraaah!
The Ulk recovered and pounced.
Its claws snagged Lumina's hair tie, freeing her locks.
Shirone grabbed the Ulk's waist and teleported.
Grrraaah!
They soared skyward, then plummeted toward the cliff.
The Ulk thrashed, but Shirone kept teleporting, disorienting it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He'd set the teleportation vector downward—a forbidden technique.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What now? If we fall, it won't die.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Teleporting canceled kinetic energy, making the fall harmless. But releasing the magic meant facing the Ulk's fury.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I need mass…!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then, a shiver ran down Shirone's spine. An overwhelming sensation flooded his mind—fragments of thought: the universe's birth, gauge symmetry, a swirling vortex above his bed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mass wasn't force. It was the power to breach cosmic symmetry.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The void he'd felt upon returning from infinity—the missing piece was gravity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As omnipresence aligned, the dissonance resolved. The condition for magic was met.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone photonized the Ulk and hurled it downward.
Grra…!
The impact silenced its cry. The body bounced with a hollow thud.
Shirone landed gracefully with Rainbow Drop, staring at the corpse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haah. Haah.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Matter wasn't born with mass. Another element granted and erased it—a particle beyond human perception.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Higgs boson.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That was the truth Shirone had grasped in infinity, the reason for broken symmetry.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Got it. I finally understand.
His fists clenched, trembling with emotion so intense it brought tears.
Kyaaaah!
A scream echoed from the cliff.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No way…?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ulks were social creatures. It was unlikely to travel alone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No!
He teleported back to the summit, freezing at the sight.
Dozens of Ulks surrounded the children.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I underestimated their society.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: W-what do we do? We're dead.

blocks.speaker: Lumina
blocks.content: I didn't even get married. I don't want to die.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay, guys. I'll handle this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How? Just run. You can escape with magic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's fine. Now, breaking the rules doesn't matter.
He stepped toward the pack.

blocks.speaker: Altol
blocks.content: Shirone! It's dangerous!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay. I'll handle this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The silver-furred chieftain nodded, and its lieutenant charged.
Grrraaah!
Shirone gathered photons in his palm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not enough. More… more…
The light paled, then flared blindingly white.
The Ulk closed in.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone gauged the distance, altering the photons' properties.
As the children's screams peaked, the Ulk swung.
Shirone teleported a meter back, eyes wide.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now!
He hurled the compressed photons.
A pale flash struck the Ulk's stomach, crushing it before erupting into a golden beam.
Grrraaah!
The creature flew back, colliding with others and tumbling down the mountain.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No way. Did you see that? That huge monster just flew dozens of meters.

blocks.speaker: Lumina
blocks.content: How? Is that magic?
Ma…gic…user…
The chieftain sniffed, its intelligence evident as it spoke in broken human tongue.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He could win.
